mapper.select: SELECT user_id, emp_no, department, employment_type, email, password, password_reset_required, full_name, position_title, phone_number, class_name, paid_leave_days, notes, user_role, can_approve_attendance, is_active, deleted_at, created_at, updated_at, last_login_at, annual_leave_grant_days, annual_leave_increment, max_paid_leave_days, failed_login_count, locked_until, account_locked, hire_date, scheduled_end_date FROM users WHERE user_id = #{userId}

SELECT user_id, emp_no, department, employment_type, email, password, password_reset_required, full_name, position_title, phone_number, class_name, paid_leave_days, notes, user_role, can_approve_attendance, is_active, deleted_at, created_at, updated_at, last_login_at, annual_leave_grant_days, annual_leave_increment, max_paid_leave_days, failed_login_count, locked_until, account_locked, hire_date, scheduled_end_date FROM users WHERE user_id = #{userId} FOR UPDATE

SELECT user_id, emp_no, department, employment_type, email, password, password_reset_required, full_name, position_title, phone_number, class_name, paid_leave_days, notes, user_role, can_approve_attendance, is_active, deleted_at, created_at, updated_at, last_login_at, annual_leave_grant_days, annual_leave_increment, max_paid_leave_days, failed_login_count, locked_until, account_locked, hire_date, scheduled_end_date FROM users WHERE email = #{email}

SELECT user_id, emp_no, department, employment_type, email, password, password_reset_required, full_name, position_title, phone_number, class_name, paid_leave_days, notes, user_role, can_approve_attendance, is_active, deleted_at, created_at, updated_at, last_login_at, annual_leave_grant_days, annual_leave_increment, max_paid_leave_days, failed_login_count, locked_until, account_locked, hire_date, scheduled_end_date FROM users WHERE email = #{email} FOR UPDATE

SELECT user_id, emp_no, department, employment_type, email, password, password_reset_required, full_name, position_title, phone_number, class_name, paid_leave_days, notes, user_role, can_approve_attendance, is_active, deleted_at, created_at, updated_at, last_login_at, annual_leave_grant_days, annual_leave_increment, max_paid_leave_days, failed_login_count, locked_until, account_locked, hire_date, scheduled_end_date FROM users WHERE is_active = true ORDER BY user_id ASC

SELECT user_id, emp_no, department, employment_type, email, password, password_reset_required, full_name, position_title, phone_number, class_name, paid_leave_days, notes, user_role, can_approve_attendance, is_active, deleted_at, created_at, updated_at, last_login_at, annual_leave_grant_days, annual_leave_increment, max_paid_leave_days, failed_login_count, locked_until, account_locked, hire_date, scheduled_end_date FROM users WHERE deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY user_id ASC

choose.when: is_active = true AND deleted_at IS NULL

if.test: department != null and department != '' and department != 'All Departments'

where.if: AND (LOWER(full_name) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{keyword}), '%') OR LOWER(emp_no) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{keyword}), '%'))

mapper.select:
SELECT user_id, emp_no, department, employment_type, email, password, password_reset_required, full_name, position_title, phone_number, class_name, paid_leave_days, notes, user_role, can_approve_attendance, is_active, deleted_at, created_at, updated_at, last_login_at, annual_leave_grant_days, annual_leave_increment, max_paid_leave_days, failed_login_count, locked_until, account_locked, hire_date, scheduled_end_date FROM users
ORDER BY user_id ASC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT user_id, emp_no, department, employment_type, email, password, password_reset_required, full_name, position_title, phone_number, class_name, paid_leave_days, notes, user_role, can_approve_attendance, is_active, deleted_at, created_at, updated_at, last_login_at, annual_leave_grant_days, annual_leave_increment, max_paid_leave_days, failed_login_count, locked_until, account_locked, hire_date, scheduled_end_date FROM users WHERE user_role = #{role} AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT user_id, emp_no, department, employment_type, email, password, password_reset_required, full_name, position_title, phone_number, class_name, paid_leave_days, notes, user_role, can_approve_attendance, is_active, deleted_at, created_at, updated_at, last_login_at, annual_leave_grant_days, annual_leave_increment, max_paid_leave_days, failed_login_count, locked_until, account_locked, hire_date, scheduled_end_date FROM users WHERE user_role = 'ADMIN' AND is_active = true AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY user_id ASC

SELECT user_id, emp_no, department, employment_type, email, password, password_reset_required, full_name, position_title, phone_number, class_name, paid_leave_days, notes, user_role, can_approve_attendance, is_active, deleted_at, created_at, updated_at, last_login_at, annual_leave_grant_days, annual_leave_increment, max_paid_leave_days, failed_login_count, locked_until, account_locked, hire_date, scheduled_end_date FROM users WHERE is_active = true AND scheduled_end_date IS NOT NULL AND scheduled_end_date < #{today} ORDER BY user_id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users ( emp_no, department, employment_type, email, password, password_reset_required, full_name, position_title, phone_number, class_name, paid_leave_days, notes, user_role, can_approve_attendance, is_active, deleted_at, created_at, updated_at, hire_date ) VALUES ( #{empNo}, #{department}, #{employmentType}, #{email}, #{password}, COALESCE(#{passwordResetRequired}, false), #{fullName}, #{positionTitle}, #{phoneNumber}, #{className}, COALESCE(#{paidLeaveDays}, 10.0), #{notes}, #{userRole,typeHandler=com.attendance.app.config.typehandler.UserRoleTypeHandler}, COALESCE(#{canApproveAttendance}, false), #{isActive}, #{deletedAt,typeHandler=com.attendance.app.config.typehandler.InstantTypeHandler,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, NOW(), NOW(), #{hireDate} )
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET emp_no = #{empNo}, department = #{department}, employment_type = #{employmentType}, email = #{email}, password = #{password}, password_reset_required = #{passwordResetRequired}, full_name = #{fullName}, position_title = #{positionTitle}, phone_number = #{phoneNumber}, class_name = #{className}, paid_leave_days = #{paidLeaveDays}, notes = #{notes}, user_role = #{userRole,typeHandler=com.attendance.app.config.typehandler.UserRoleTypeHandler}, can_approve_attendance = #{canApproveAttendance}, is_active = #{isActive}, deleted_at = #{deletedAt,typeHandler=com.attendance.app.config.typehandler.InstantTypeHandler,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, last_login_at = #{lastLoginAt}, hire_date = #{hireDate}, scheduled_end_date = #{scheduledEndDate}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE users SET paid_leave_days = #{paidLeaveDays}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}

UPDATE users SET annual_leave_grant_days = #{annualLeaveGrantDays}, annual_leave_increment = #{annualLeaveIncrement}, max_paid_leave_days = #{maxPaidLeaveDays}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE users SET class_name = #{className}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE users SET class_name = #{newClassName}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE class_name = #{oldClassName}
UPDATE users SET class_name = NULL, updated_at = NOW() WHERE class_name = #{className}
UPDATE users SET last_login_at = #{lastLoginAt, typeHandler=com.attendance.app.config.typehandler.InstantTypeHandler}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE users SET password = #{password}, password_reset_required = #{passwordResetRequired}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE users SET is_active = false, deleted_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM users WHERE email = #{email})
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET failed_login_count = #{failedLoginCount}, locked_until = #{lockedUntil, typeHandler=com.attendance.app.config.typehandler.InstantTypeHandler}, account_locked = #{accountLocked}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE users SET failed_login_count = 0, locked_until = NULL, account_locked = false, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
